title: Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with lentils, vegetables, and aromatic spices. Perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion, carrot, and garlic; cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper (if using); cook for 1 minute.
Add lentils, stir to combine, and cook for 1 minute.
Add 4 cups of water; bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until the lentils are tender, about 20-25 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro (if desired)
